creator: martin.dieringer@gmx.de
text:
I approve because it's me, my email address changed.
I guess I should have changed the maintainer address?

m.d.




On Tue, 9 Sep 2008, Edwin Groothuis wrote:

> Maintainer of audio/dvda-author,
>
> Please note that PR ports/127247 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/127247
>
